mission: The Association of National Economic Cooperation of Uzbekistan was founded in May 2025 and operates as a platform for strengthening economic cooperation, attracting investment, supporting entrepreneurship, and expanding Uzbekistan's international economic partnerships. The association works with national institutions, international partners, investors, and entrepreneurs to create opportunities for economic development and collaboration.
goals: Expansion of National Export Potential — supporting Uzbek businesses in expanding export capabilities and entering international markets
Attraction of Investment — facilitating investment opportunities and cooperation with international investors
Establishment of Partnership Relations — strengthening partnerships between businesses, institutions, and international organizations
Formation of the 'National Bridge' Concept — creating a bridge between Uzbekistan and international markets for cooperation, investment, and knowledge exchange
Development of Competencies and Knowledge Transfer — organizing educational programs, seminars, and professional development initiatives
activities: Organizing international economic forums and conferences
Signing bilateral and multilateral cooperation memorandums
Providing consulting and mediation services for investment projects
Supporting entrepreneurs through export development programs
Conducting educational seminars, trainings, and professional development programs
Developing cooperation with Turkey, Saudi Arabia, China, UK, USA, and Pakistan
Maintaining international representation in nearly 20 countries
